packs.name: blip
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A deadpan screen-faced robot — one antenna with an accent ball tip, two dot eyes on a screen.

packs.name: pip
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A small round bird — a soft ball with dot eyes; the tiny beak carries the accent.

packs.name: cone
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A deadpan traffic cone — one accent stripe; the character for blockers, WIP, and caution.

packs.name: sprout
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A just-sprouted seed — one accent leaf on its head; the character for growth and compounding.

packs.name: lumen
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A small light bulb — one accent filament; the character for ideas, plans, and how-it-works pieces.

packs.name: anvil
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A small anvil — accent horn; the character for hard feedback and where things get hammered out.

packs.name: volt
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A small battery — one accent terminal nub; the character for energy, capacity, and recharge.

packs.name: mole
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A plump clay mole — coral nose-tip accent; the character for debugging, root-cause digging, and going deep.

packs.name: stamp
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: An upright rubber stamp — accent knob handle; the character for approvals, sign-off, and shipping gates.

packs.name: lapse
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: An hourglass — the sand carries the accent; the character for deadlines, timeboxes, and where the time went.

packs.name: scope
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A stout periscope with a lens-window face — accent lens rim; the character for observability, monitoring, and scope creep.

packs.name: boss
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A round shield with a domed center boss — the dome carries the accent; the character for security, guarding prod, and boss fights.

packs.name: brew
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A squat coffee mug — accent loop handle; the character for deep work, steeping ideas, and builds brewing.

packs.name: inch
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A chalk inchworm arched mid-step — orange rear gripper pad accent; the character for incremental progress, step-by-step migrations, and "how far along are we".

packs.name: grit
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A pixel tardigrade — magenta snout-tube accent; the character for resilience, fault tolerance, and outages. Has survived worse and does not bring it up.

packs.name: heft
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A stout ball-rolling beetle — vermilion pusher pads on its front feet; the character for tech debt, the big slow refactor, and moving loads bigger than itself.

packs.name: lure
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A deep-sea anglerfish in glowing CRT trace — amber lure-bead accent; the character for search and retrieval, log grepping, and the one match rising out of the dark.

packs.name: squall
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A small storm cloud with one zigzag bolt-tail accent — the character for incidents, outages, war rooms, and postmortems; it IS the storm being weathered.

packs.name: berg
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A small iceberg — orange peak-cap accent above the dashed waterline; the character for estimates, hidden complexity, and the nine-tenths of the project the ticket didn't mention.

packs.name: clam
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A smooth closed clam on stub feet — tomato hinge-knob accent; the character for encapsulation, API design, and clean interfaces: simple outside, busy inside.

packs.name: yoke
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A placid zebu ox — orange shoulder-hump accent; the character for automation, delegation, cron jobs, and agents: hitch it to the work, walk away, it finishes.

packs.name: tug
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A glossy red horseshoe magnet with bare-steel tips — the character for dependencies, lockfiles, and the install that drags half the internet along.

packs.name: patch
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A fat roll of tape — lifted red tab accent; the character for hotfixes, workarounds, and duct-tape engineering that holds the seam until the real fix ships.

packs.name: scrub
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A beveled eraser wedge — scuffed coral working-edge accent; the character for deleting dead code, paying down tech debt, and anything that no longer needs to exist.

packs.name: sift
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A footed colander — rolled-rim accent band, dot-holes that ARE pixels; the character for filtering and triage: signal vs noise, alert fatigue, letting the unimportant fall through.

packs.name: nona
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A plain wooden nesting doll — vermilion seam accent; the character for releases, versioning, changelogs, and semver: every version she ships still carries the one before it.

packs.name: stoke
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A vacuum tube on a socket puck — warm amber filament-glow core accent; the character for caching and warm starts: cache hits, memoization, cold starts, and warm pools.

packs.name: clack
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: An upright blank domino tile — painted center seam accent; the character for cascading failures, chain reactions, and stopping the topple one tile short of the database.

packs.name: dice
packs.author: Trevin Chow
packs.description: A plump one-pip die — top-face pip accent; the character for chance and nondeterminism: flaky tests, A/B experiments, risky rollouts, and "roll the dice" decisions.

packs.name: bray
packs.author: Matt Van Horn
packs.description: A small donkey bent from one continuous loop of craft wire — accent tail-tip tuft; the patient pack animal for hauling loads, batch jobs, and slow steady throughput.
